title: Mitre Impel L30P Unisex Football
features: BUILT TO PERFORM: The Mitre Impel L30P Football is the ideal all-weather soft-touch training football, suitable for a kickabout at home or practicing your skills with your team making this an ideal gift for kids and adults old and young

PERFECT FOR YOUNG FOOTBALLERS: This essential kit is suitable for younger football players, with a soft EVA foam backing and Vimini outer texture for enhanced grip and control, leaving children eager to keep learning and playing

DURABILITY and CONSTRUCTION: With a PU outer material, this ball is designed with a 30-panel construction for hard wearing durability while the Hyperseam TM technology bonded and stitched seams allow for almost zero water uptake on the pitch

FIND YOUR FIT: Available in various sizes and colourways, depending on age and style, the Impel is designed for both kids' and adult football and suitable for grass or Astro-Tur. Ball comes deflated and requires inflation, so ensure you have your Mitre pump

REVOLUTIONARY ENGINEERED INNOVATION: Mitre is the world's original sports brand. For nearly 200 years, we have been shouting our love and passion for the game. We value innovation, and we work hard to ensure our durable products always deliver
